findings.evidence: The proof at lines 50-52 only rewrites `Q.under ℤ = span {(p : ℤ)}` and `Ideal.mem_span_singleton`; Mathlib already provides the general ingredients in `Mathlib/RingTheory/Ideal/Over.lean:91-123` (`under`, `mem_under`, `LiesOver`, `mem_of_liesOver`).
findings.fix: State it for a general target ring, e.g. `{B : Type*} [Semiring B] [Algebra ℤ B] (Q : Ideal B) [Q.LiesOver (span {(p : ℤ)})]`, or avoid adding this wrapper and use `Ideal.mem_of_liesOver` plus `Ideal.mem_span_singleton` at the call sites.
findings.issue: `algebraMap_int_mem_iff_dvd_of_liesOver` is public API specialized to `Q : Ideal (𝓞 K)` with `[Field K] [NumberField K]`, although the result only uses ideal comap along `algebraMap ℤ B`.

summary: The private multiquadratic helpers now sit at the intended pointwise level, but the new public `LiesOver` membership lemma is still stated at an unnecessarily number-field-specific level.
